summary: Single-modality deep baseline using only vibration STFT. Temperature branch disabled.

stratified.notes: Phase 1: train from scratch on stratified split. n_fft=2048, 160x160. Must run before temporal phase.

temporal.notes: Phase 2: fine-tune from stratified checkpoint. STFT params matched to multimodal temporal (n_fft=2048, 160x160) for fair comparison. Requires stratified phase to complete first.
